name: Christmas Journey to Santa
short_description: Christmas Journey to Santa is a relaxing platformer game about a snowman who dreams of meeting Santa Claus on Christmas Eve. He sets off on a long journey to fulfill his wish.
detailed_description:
Christmas Journey to Santa is a relaxing platformer game about a snowman who dreams of meeting Santa Claus on Christmas Eve. He sets off on a long journey to fulfill his wish. Traveling around the world, he collects magic red coins as a gift for Santa.
On his way, he meets many obstacles, so you need to be careful and agile to avoid them.
You will enjoy colorful graphics and beautiful music that will create a truly festive mood.
A magical atmosphere and positive emotions await both children and adults in the game.
Are you ready to help the snowman fulfill his dream?
about_the_game:

A magical atmosphere and positive emotions await both children and adults in the game.
Are you ready to help the snowman fulfill his dream?
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Ukrainian
